attributes.description: Alerts when FD utilisation exceeds 80%. FD exhaustion rejects client connections.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] File descriptor utilization high

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper file descriptor utilization high

### What fired
Peak FD utilisation exceeded 80% during the window.

### Why it matters
Every client connection uses one FD plus FDs for snapshot/transaction logs. Exhaustion blocks new connections.

### Triage
1. Inspect client connection churn.

### Remediation
- Raise `ulimit -n`.

### Tuning
- 80% threshold.
